top_signals.title: Stocks Rise as Trump Says He’ll Make Call on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks toward a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
